---
title: "Claire Timm"
image: photo.jpg
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/clairetimm
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:clairetimm@ucsb.edu
---

# Hello, welcome to my website!

I'm Claire, a third year Environmental Studies student at the University of California, Santa Barbara. I made this website to broadcast my coding skills in a statistics class.
